name: Capellini with Burst Cherry Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Pitted & sliced olives (Italian, Greek, or canned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven over medium-high heat until very hot.
2. Add the cherry tomatoes and gently stir occasionally to ensure even heating. Cover with a lid and cook for 10-12 minutes, shaking the pan once to help the tomatoes burst.
3. Remove the lid; if the tomatoes have not burst, continue cooking by pressing them gently with the back of a spoon until they release their juices.
4. Add garlic, red pepper flakes, oregano, olives, and salt to taste. Lower the heat and simmer for an additional 7-10 minutes.
5. Cook the pasta according to package instructions, then drain.
6. Top the drained pasta with a generous ladle of sauce and grated Parmesan cheese. Serve four.
